checks.describe: the Deep Dive traces the four-stage cost-accounting path (token count incl. hidden reasoning → price → per-key spend row → budget check on the NEXT request) and names the $0-cost mechanism (price defaults to zero for self-hosted)
checks.run: F=site/docs/m12-gateway-trust/deep-dive.md; if grep -q 'cost-accounting path' "$F" && grep -qi 'hidden reasoning' "$F" && grep -q 'spend row' "$F" && grep -qi 'next request' "$F" && grep -q 'defaults to zero' "$F"; then echo cost-path-ok; else echo cost-path-incomplete; fi

checks.describe: the Deep Dive explains guardrail hook ordering (pre_call vs during vs post) and why prompt_injection_params without the detect_prompt_injection callback is inert — registration vs configuration
checks.run: F=site/docs/m12-gateway-trust/deep-dive.md; if grep -q 'pre_call' "$F" && grep -q 'post_call' "$F" && grep -q 'prompt_injection_params' "$F" && grep -qi 'registers the hook' "$F" && grep -qi 'silent no-op' "$F"; then echo hook-ordering-ok; else echo hook-ordering-incomplete; fi

checks.describe: the Deep Dive documents the eval-gate wiring in both forms (promptfoo exit code → GitHub Actions required check AND Argo step when-condition, extending M11's pipeline) and the 16 GB / in-cluster delta
checks.run: F=site/docs/m12-gateway-trust/deep-dive.md; if grep -qi 'exit code' "$F" && grep -q 'GitHub Actions' "$F" && grep -q 'Argo' "$F" && grep -q 'when:' "$F" && grep -q '16 GB' "$F"; then echo gate-wiring-doc-ok; else echo gate-wiring-doc-incomplete; fi

checks.describe: the Deep Dive carries at least one Mermaid diagram (the cost-accounting path, the hook-ordering lifecycle, or the gate-wiring flow) per the diagram-required convention
checks.run: F=site/docs/m12-gateway-trust/deep-dive.md; if grep -q '```mermaid' "$F"; then echo deepdive-mermaid-ok; else echo deepdive-mermaid-missing; fi

checks.describe: the Deep Dive surveys ragas (industrial RAG metrics) as a concept rather than requiring it on the 8 GB path — the judge stays the M5 two-layer pattern, honestly scoped
checks.run: F=site/docs/m12-gateway-trust/lab.md; G=site/docs/m12-gateway-trust/deep-dive.md; if grep -qi 'ragas' "$F" || grep -qi 'ragas' "$G"; then echo ragas-surveyed-ok; else echo ragas-note-missing; fi
